name: llm-document-workflow
description: Reusable LLM document workflow engine for prompt/schema management, provider adapters, output normalization, repair, and report contracts.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check prompt-store.js && node --check workflow-runner.js && node --check errors.js && node --check adapters/visitor-insurance-legacy.js && node --check provider-adapters/gemini-provider.js && node --check provider-adapters/mock-provider.js && node --check provider-adapters/provider-registry.js && node --check normalizer/json-extractor.js && node --check normalizer/json-schema-lite.js && node --check normalizer/schema-validator.js && node --check normalizer/repair-runner.js && node --check normalizer/markdown-fallback.js && node --check normalizer/normalizer-registry.js && node --check normalizer/policy-analysis-normalizer.js && node --check workflows/policy-analysis-default.js && node --check examples/basic-mock/index.js && node --check examples/custom-normalizer/index.js
